title: Auth over the tailnet — Clerkenstein auth + the whole browser surface under ONE trusted HTTPS MagicDNS origin: mkcert->tailscale cert (path-only drop-in), dotted-pk validation, the tailscale-serve reverse-proxy generator, the FAPI-same-host topology guard, the confirmed build-rebuild-on-HOST guard, and the cdn.jsdelivr.net egress (FAKE_FAPI_CLERKJS_CDN). All gated on --public-host, byte-identical when unset; config generation + unit tests only (the live cross-machine run is M215).
kind: the v2.2 'panorama' M213 (auth/TLS) milestone — Python + bash in rext tooling (stack-injection/gen_tailscale_serve.py NEW + inject.py; demo-stack/up-injected.sh) PLUS Go (clerkenstein/clerk-frontend/server.go clerkJSCDNBase). ZERO platform-repo edits. Code-of-record: rext tag panorama-m213 @ b9f41dd (frozen at close — rext re-tag reserved for /developer-kit:close-release). The rosetta m213 branch carries plan/doc + the corpus docs (clerkenstein.md, recipe-browser-login.md, frontend-tier.md).

tests.counts_source: authoritative — pytest --junit-xml per section, tallied from the parsed XML (not grepped stdout); go from `go test ./...` exit-code-gated `ok` lines
tests.python_delta: +33 M213 test funcs across the sections (build) then +11 more (harden Pass 1). stack-injection 130 (M212) -> 152 (+22: gen_tailscale_serve.main in-process x5 + require_dotted_host boundary + build's serve/dotted-host tests). demo-stack 350 (M212) -> 367 (+17: the functional guard-execution tests + serve/egress coverage).

tests.flake_gate: 5/5 clean. go clerk-frontend: -race -shuffle=on -count=5 (randomized order) clean. stack-injection: 5x sequential (144p/8s identical each run). demo-stack test_tooling.py (the M213-touched file): 5x sequential (128p identical each run). pytest-randomly not installed -> sequential 5x (deterministic intra-suite order = realistic CI condition).

coverage.note: harden Pass 1 (recorded in progress.md). gen_tailscale_serve.py 64% -> 98% statements (only the __main__ entrypoint guard remains, exercised via subprocess). inject.py held at 98% (require_dotted_host/mint_pk/parse_pk/main fully covered; only __main__ guard remains). clerk-frontend touched funcs (clerkJSCDNBase, handleClerkJSBundle) 100%/100%. Bash guards (dotted-host + topology) moved from grep-pinned to functionally executed under set -euo pipefail.

delivered.fapi_cert_swap: gen_tailscale_fapi_cert (up-injected.sh): when STACK_PUBLIC_HOST is set, mint a real Let's Encrypt cert via `tailscale cert --cert-file $CERTS/fapi.crt --key-file $CERTS/fapi.key $HOST` (trusted tailnet-wide, no CA install) -> SAME output paths as mkcert/openssl, so the path-only mount + fake-fapi ListenAndServeTLS are untouched. Falls back non-fatally to the factored gen_local_fapi_cert (mkcert/openssl LOCAL trust). Proven live on billion 2026-07-11 (ssl_verify_result=0 from a remote machine). D-CERT-1.
delivered.dotted_pk_validation: inject.py::require_dotted_host + an early up-injected.sh case-guard reject a dotless --public-host loud at wiring time (the dotless-pk-rejected gene: @clerk/backend rejects a pk whose decoded FAPI host has no dot). The codec mint_pk STAYS permissive (a faithful mirror of clerk-frontend/key.go, which the alignment runner drives dotless on purpose). D-PK-1 (refines M212 D-IMPL-1).
delivered.reverse_proxy_generator: gen_tailscale_serve.py (NEW): emits per-port `tailscale serve --bg --https=<offsetport> http://127.0.0.1:<offsetport>` for the browser-facing plaintext services {app 8082, cosmo 5050, next-web 3000, studio-desk 9000, academy 3077}+offset — the fake-FAPI (5400) EXCLUDED (self-TLS). Zero net-new dep (tailscale CLI already on every target VM). Pure generation; wired gated+non-fatal in up-injected.sh. D-PROXY-1/2. Live stand-up is M215.
delivered.topology_guard: up-injected.sh: `[ "$HOST" != "$FAPI_HOST" ]` => exit 1 on the public path — the FAPI must be same-host as the app so the host-only SameSite=Lax handshake cookie stays same-site. Equal-by-construction today (one STACK_PUBLIC_HOST knob), a regression tripwire for a future subdomain split. PSL VERIFIED: ts.net is the public suffix -> taildc510.ts.net is the eTLD+1. D-TOPO-1.
delivered.rebuild_guard_confirmed: the M212 want_ep cache-validator embeds $HOST, so a localhost->MagicDNS change invalidates a stale localhost-baked frontend image -> rebuild (re-baking the new pk). CONFIRMED + re-verified under M213's diff, already test-covered by M212's harden. D-REBUILD-1 (no new code).
delivered.egress_made_explicit: clerk-frontend/server.go: the hardcoded cdn.jsdelivr.net turned into clerkJSCDNBase() + a defaultClerkJSCDN const + a FAKE_FAPI_CLERKJS_CDN override -> unit-testable (httptest, no real network) + operator-overridable to a mirror. up-injected.sh adds a non-fatal host-side egress pre-check. JS/FAPI alignment re-scored 100%/100%. D-EGRESS-1.

notes: M213 makes Clerkenstein auth complete from a remote tailnet browser under one trusted HTTPS MagicDNS origin — config-only because the three load-bearing premises align (dotted-host validator + host-agnostic token verify + path-only cert mount). The tailscale cert swap was PROVEN live on billion (ssl_verify_result=0 from a remote machine) before build. All work is gated on --public-host (byte-identical when unset). The build held under harden Pass 1 + 4 close adversarial scenarios with zero defects. rext code-of-record FROZEN at tag panorama-m213 (b9f41dd) — the sole close residual (a section-README index row) is routed to close-release rather than re-pointing the frozen tag. Runs parallel with M214 (origins & links); both feed M215 (prove it on odyssey — the live cross-machine acceptance gate).
